n: The Schemes of the Pale Herald

steps.t: Legolas has asked you to unbind Felgúr and send him on his mission. You should talk to Felgúr in Echad Taerdim.
Felgúr has begun tracking the other Ungoledain. You should travel with Felgúr.
Felgúr has begun tracking the other Ungoledain. You should travel with Felgúr.
Felgúr has begun tracking the other Ungoledain. You should travel with Felgúr.
Felgúr has begun tracking the other Ungoledain. You should travel with Felgúr.
Legolas has appeared near an Uruk camp in eastern Cirith Ungol. You should talk to Legolas.
Legolas has asked you to find evidence of Rûkhor's plans in Kaslokroz. You should find written orders to the Uruk lieutenants.
Legolas is waiting near Kaslokroz. You should talk to Legolas.
